content.text:
<think>
This is a log-log plot of # Documents vs URL domain rank. The x-axis ticks are at 10^1, 10^3, 10^5, 10^7 (with 10^0 implied at the left edge).

Looking at the slope in log-log space across the curve:
- Near rank 10^0 to 10^1: The curve drops steeply from ~10^7 to ~10^5.5 — roughly 1.5 decades of drop over 1 decade of rank → slope ≈ -1.5 (steepest)
- From rank 10^1 to 10^3: Only ~0.5 decades of drop over 2 decades → slope ≈ -0.25 (plateau/shoulder)
- From rank 10^3 to 10^5: ~1 decade drop over 2 decades → slope ≈ -0.5
- From rank 10^5 to 10^7: ~1.5 decades drop over 2 decades → slope ≈ -0.75

The steepest portion of the curve is at the very start, near rank 10^0 where the curve plunges most sharply.
</think>

<answer>
10^0
</answer>
